_comment: Bulk-listing hybrid pricing config (owner-editable, live-read per request — no restart needed). Tier floors are CONSERVATIVE owner-set floors, not market claims (Golden Rule 4): an un-edited batch under-prices. All amounts AUD floats; the engine converts to integer cents exactly once.

market_threshold_aud._comment: At/above this, the live market price is used (rounded); below it the tier floor applies.

tiers._comment: tiers[game][rarityClass][finishClass] AUD floor. rarityClass: common|uncommon|rare|default. finishClass: Base|Holo|Reverse Holo|Foil|Enchanted|default.
